_comment: Live-sim viewer appearance + window. Read by the Godot viewer (TerrainLoader.gd) at startup via the --viewer-config launch arg (run_sim.sh). Edit and relaunch run_sim.sh to change; independent of the terrain build. window.mode is windowed | maximized | fullscreen | exclusive_fullscreen. Colors/vectors are [r, g, b]. Terrain grade: out = clamp((albedo*gain + offset), contrast about 0.5, saturation) * value; then rendered matte with specular (0 = matte, so value/gain cleanly darken; raise for a shiny look). gain default [1,1,1], offset default [0,0,0] (may be negative), value/contrast/saturation default 1.0, specular default 0.0. Sky top_color/horizon_color are ABSOLUTE; brightness/saturation are multipliers where 1.0 = source.
